rulings.Case Title: MAX SHIRRY-WYSS VS. NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 6, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS LP Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is continued to July 29, 2020. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR COLBORN VS. 25 CAPRA LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 6, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT PRADO GROUP, INC., 25 CAPRA, LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication is continued to July 16, 2020. Trial is continued to August 17, 2020. If parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after July 16, 2020/August 17, 2020, parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on May 6, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. = (501/CFH)
